description: UN FAOSTAT global food & agriculture statistics over a local SQLite mirror, via MCP.
name: io.github.cyanheads/faostat-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated FAOSTAT domain codes to index into the local mirror.
environmentVariables.name: FAOSTAT_DOMAINS

environmentVariables.description: Directory holding the per-domain SQLite mirror databases and the shared dimension database.
environmentVariables.name: FAOSTAT_MIRROR_PATH

environmentVariables.description: FAOSTAT bulk-download service base URL (manifest + per-domain ZIPs).
environmentVariables.name: FAOSTAT_BULK_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Cron expression for the in-process incremental mirror refresh (HTTP transport only). Omit to disable.
environmentVariables.name: FAOSTAT_REFRESH_CRON

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'duckdb' to enable the DataCanvas SQL surface (default), or 'none' to disable analytical staging.
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_PROVIDER_TYPE

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
